card.name: Embraced Cards AKT
card.text: *(Put your embraced cards here. They're in exile, and you may play them on a later turn that a source you control that shares a creature type with it dealt damage to an opponent.)*

card.text: *(This card and its name is the creature type chosen as it was created.)*

card.name: ALARM() ERR
card.text: Whenever this Subroutine runs, create a 1/1 white Citizen creature token.

card.name: AUR DRAFT ARCHETYPES AUR
card.text: {W}{U} REVELATIONS Witness the majesty of the ascendant by turning your small creatures and spells into powerful combinations! {U}{B} SABOTEURS Predate the night by slinking past your opponent's blockers and going for the life total directly. {B}{R} AURORA CONTROL Play the long game as you remove threats, cast off-color spells and accrue value until your aurora is complete. {R}{G} AURORA MIDRANGE Beat your opponent down with on-curve threats then boost them all with your aurora! {G}{W} ABILITY COUNTERS Have your creatures share their abilities for the good of the collective as you capitalize off different counters. {W}{B} +1/+1 COUNTERS Scavenge the flesh of the dead to grow your threats. Your opponent's life total is next! {B}{G} GO-WIDE Grow your board before you infect them all with a fungal buff to swing for lethal. {G}{U} LANDS Put lands in your graveyard and onto the battlefield to cast your huge threats faster! {U}{R} SPELLSLINGER AGGRO Use elemental infusions to blast your opponent with spells before they can react. {R}{W} BLINK Aetherize and reuse your powerful enters effects until nobody can compete with the value.

card.name: A Handful of Minions PRISM
card.text: When A Handful of Minions dies, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token.

card.name: Ageless Caretaker WAW
card.text: During your turn, this creature has indestructible and vigilance. This creature gets +1/+0 for each other creature you control. *(This token's mana cost is {4}{W}.)*

card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* The next creature spell you cast this turn has base power and toughness 4/4.

card.name: Emblem KDT
card.text: Whenever a creature dies, exile it from its owner's graveyard. Until your next end step, you may cast copies of the exiled card.

card.name: Errors in the Weft ERR
card.text: This is a battlecruiser magic set. Expect games to go long and big creatures to matter. {W}{U}: Blink {U}{B}: Reanimator {B}{R}: Corrupt *(Controlling a permanent with a greater mana value)* {R}{G}: Sacrifice artifacts and enchantments {G}{W}: Fabric *(Effects that count the number of enchantments you control)* {W}{B}: Level Up {B}{G}: Graveyard Recursion {G}{U}: Cache *(Enchantment tokens that you can pay {2} and sacrifice to play the card under them)* {U}{R}: Subroutines *(Enchantments with effects that happen every three turns)* {R}{W}: Tokens

card.name: Excise Faith INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* Excise Faith deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Far-Off Lands INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Fiery Embrace INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* Fiery Embrace deals X damage to any target, where X is 2 plus the number of cards named Fiery Embrace in your graveyard.

card.text: Menace

card.name: Flowering Germinus WAW
card.text: Whenever one or more other creatures you control die, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. *(This token's mana cost is {1}{G/W}{G/W}.)*

card.name: Gilded Ancient WAW
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control. *(This token's mana cost is {5}{G}.)*

card.name: Grasping Scoundrel INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* Grasping Scoundrel gets +1/+0 as long as it's attacking.

card.name: Grisly Indulgence INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* Grisly Indulgence deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Hero's Downfall INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Hunt the Weak INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Then that creature fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: I_Ancient Forerunner ITD
card.text: First strike When this creature enters, it deals damage equal to its power to each opponent.

card.name: I_Cloudscape Observer ITD
card.text: When this creature enters, return up to one target creature you don't control to its owner's hand.

card.name: I_Deepmind Oracle ITD
card.text: Flying When This creature enters, surveil X, where X is its power.

card.name: I_Emergent Anomaly ITD
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, tap up to one target creature.

card.name: I_Fracture of Divinity ITD
card.text: Vigilance Whenever an opponent casts a noncreature spell with mana value less than this creature's power, draw a card.

card.name: I_Lammasu, Dream-Stilled ITD
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: I_Mechanised Hunter ITD
card.text: When this creature enters, you may put an artifact card with mana value X or less from your hand onto the battlefield, where X is this creature's power.

card.name: I_New-Life Acolyte ITD
card.text: Artifact spells with mana value 2 or greater you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: I_Priest of Perfection ITD
card.text: Whenever you cast another spell with mana value 5 or greater, draw a card.

card.name: I_Shifting Silverscape ITD
card.text: {T}: Add {C} {T}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only if you control a creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Ilcan Keyseeker WAW
card.text: When this creature enters, untap target creature and put a +1/+1 counter on it. If that creature is a Wonder, put an additional +1/+1 counter on it. *(This token's mana cost is {1}{W}.)*

card.name: Jenna Wilder, Timewinder INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* When Jenna Wilder enters or is turned face up, you may conjure three cards named Jenna Wilder, Timewinder and shuffle them into your library. Whenever you cast another spell that shares a name with Jenna Wilder, draw two cards.

card.name: Kindly Skywinder WAW
card.text: When this creature enters, target creature you control gains flying until end of turn. *(This token's mana cost is {3}{W}.)*

card.name: Lakebed Wrudge WAW
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library any time. As long as you control another permanent named Lakebed Wrudge, you may play lands and cast spells from the top of your library. {T}: Mill a card. *(This token's mana cost is {1}{U}.)*

card.name: Lightning Helix INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* Lightning Helix deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.

card.name: MOUNT() ERR
card.text: Whenever this Subroutine runs, target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Marauder's Enlistment INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste and is a Pirate in addition to its other types until end of turn.

card.name: Meteor Barrage INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* Meteor Barrage deals 3 damage to each creature.

card.name: Music of the Deepholt WAW
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. *(This token's mana cost is {2}{U}.)*

card.name: New Tensuo Clergy WAW
card.text: Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. *(This token's mana cost is {2}{B}.)*

card.name: New Tensuo Luminary WAW
card.text: Whenever another creature with base power 1 or less enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn. *(This token's mana value is {W}.)*

card.name: New Tensuo Physician WAW
card.text: When this creature enters, return target card from your graveyard to your hand. If it was a land or multicolored card, you gain 5 life. *(This token's mana cost is {4}{G}.)*

card.name: New Tensuo Vanguard WAW
card.text: When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain first strike until end of turn. *(This token's mana cost is {4}{W}.)*

card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* The next creature spell you cast this turn can be cast as though it had flash. Draw a card.

card.name: Stardust Haze WAW
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent you don't control until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. *(This token's mana cost is {3}{W}.)*

card.name: TICK() ERR
card.text: Whenever this Subroutine runs, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Through Violence ITD
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. Draw a card. *(This is a conjured card and not legal in deckbuilding)*

card.name: Traveler's Amulet INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* {1}, Sacrifice Traveler's Amulet: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Unstable Shapeshifter INK
card.text: *(This card can only be conjured)* Whenever another creature enters, Unstable Shapeshifter becomes a copy of that creature, except it has this ability.

card.name: Vrep WAW
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature. Augmented — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you've spent {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} to cast spells this turn, put a number of +1/+1 counters on target creature equal to this creature's power. *(This token's mana cost is {4}{G}.)*

card.name: blue and black Human Warlock 11SHS
card.text: When this creature dies, surveil 1. *(Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)*

card.name: blue Wolf Rogue 32PRISM
card.text: Ward {2} *(Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)*
